decoder_heading: This app uses Pollfish SDK.

decoder_heading: Pollfish is an on-line survey platform, through which, anyone may conduct surveys.

heading_content_part: Pollfish is an on-line survey platform, through which, anyone may conduct surveys.

decoder_heading: Pollfish collaborates with Publishers of applications for smartphones in order to have access to users of such applications and address survey questionnaires to them.

heading_content_part: Pollfish collaborates with Publishers of applications for smartphones in order to have access to users of such applications and address survey questionnaires to them.

decoder_heading: When a user connects to this app, a specific set of user's device data (including Advertising ID, Device ID, other available electronic identifiers and further response meta-data is automatically sent, via our app, to Pollfish servers, in order for Pollfish to discern whether the user is eligible for a survey.
